message: Cached per-function binding references from a single module graph pass, reused cached plan references for validation, revocation, interpreted dispatch, and compiled dispatch; added integrity coverage and prepare benchmark.

Verified cached binding references are collected in one module pass, stored on ExecutionPlan, included in the plan seal/integrity comparison, and reused for required-capability validation, revocation checks, interpreted dispatch, and compiled dispatch. Binding allowlist enforcement remains sound through SandboxContext.ChargeBindingCall, with regression coverage for dead/shadowed/rogue bindings and tampered binding references. Benchmark coverage exists at benchmarks/SafeIR.Benchmarks/Core/BindingReferencePlanBenchmarks.cs for 1/10/100 entrypoints sharing helper binding calls. Validation passed: focused tests passed 14/14; benchmark project build succeeded with 0 warnings and 0 errors; agentq doctor reported doctor ok.
command: dotnet test tests\SafeIR.Tests\SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReachablePolicyAnalysisTests|FullyQualifiedName~CapabilityRevocationTests|FullyQualifiedName~ExecutionPlanIntegrityTests|FullyQualifiedName~BindingResolutionTests|FullyQualifiedName~CompiledBindingCallTests"; dotnet build benchmarks\SafeIR.Benchmarks\SafeIR.Benchmarks.csproj; .\scripts\agentq.ps1 doctor
